devour.example: The hungry dog devoured its food.
devour.example_zh: 那隻餓壞的狗狼吞虎嚥地吃光食物。

diabetes.example: He controls his diabetes with diet.

dictate.example: The teacher dictated a short paragraph.
dictate.example_zh: 老師口述了一小段文字讓大家聽寫。

dictation.example: We had a spelling dictation today.
dictation.example_zh: 我們今天做了拼字聽寫。

dictator.example: The cruel dictator ruled by fear.
dictator.example_zh: 殘暴的獨裁者以恐懼來統治。

dictatorship.example: The country was under a dictatorship.
dictatorship.example_zh: 這個國家曾處於獨裁統治之下。

differentiate.example: It is hard to differentiate the twins.

diplomacy.example: The crisis was solved through diplomacy.
diplomacy.example_zh: 這場危機透過外交手段解決了。

directive.example: The boss issued a clear directive.
directive.example_zh: 老闆下達了明確的指示。

disable.example: Please disable the alarm before you enter.
disable.example_zh: 進來前請先關掉警報器。

disastrous.example: The plan had a disastrous result.
disastrous.example_zh: 這個計畫造成了災難性的後果。

disbelief.example: She stared at the news in disbelief.
disbelief.example_zh: 她難以置信地盯著這則新聞。

discharge.example: The patient was discharged from the hospital.
The factory's discharge polluted the river.
discharge.example_zh: 工廠的排放物汙染了河水。

disciple.example: The wise teacher had many disciples.
disciple.example_zh: 這位智慧的老師有許多門徒。

disclosure.example: The disclosure of the plan surprised us.
disclosure.example_zh: 計畫的揭露讓我們很驚訝。

discomfort.example: He felt some discomfort after the meal.
discomfort.example_zh: 他飯後覺得有點不舒服。

discreet.example: She was discreet about the surprise party.
discreet.example_zh: 她對驚喜派對守口如瓶。

disgrace.example: Cheating brought disgrace to the team.
disgrace.example_zh: 作弊給這支隊伍帶來了恥辱。

disgrace.example: He disgraced his family with his crime.

dismay.example: To our dismay, the trip was cancelled.
dismay.example_zh: 令我們沮喪的是，行程取消了。

dispensable.example_zh: 這些多出來的東西可有可無。

disposal.example: Proper trash disposal keeps the city clean.
disposal.example_zh: 妥善的垃圾處理能保持城市整潔。

dispose.example: Please dispose of the trash properly.

dissent.example: There was some dissent about the plan.
dissent.example_zh: 對於這個計畫有一些異議。

distraction.example: Turn off the TV to avoid distraction.

distress.example: The lost child was in great distress.
distress.example_zh: 走失的孩子非常驚慌痛苦。

disturbance.example: The loud party caused a disturbance.
disturbance.example_zh: 吵鬧的派對造成了騷擾。

diversify.example_zh: 這座農場讓作物更加多樣化。

diversion.example: A diversion sent traffic onto another road.
diversion.example_zh: 一條改道把車流引到另一條路。

divert.example: They diverted the river to stop the flood.
divert.example_zh: 他們讓河水改道以阻止洪水。

doom.example: The dark sky filled them with a sense of doom.
doom.example_zh: 陰暗的天空讓他們充滿不祥的預感。

doom.example: The plan was doomed to fail.

dormitory-dorm.example: She lives in a college dormitory.

downward.example: There was a downward trend in prices.

downward-downwards.example: The path slopes downwards to the river.
downward-downwards.example_zh: 這條小路往下斜向河邊。

doze.example: He dozed off during the boring lecture.
doze.example_zh: 他在無聊的講課中打起了瞌睡。

drastic.example: They made drastic changes to the plan.
drastic.example_zh: 他們對計畫做了大刀闊斧的更動。

draught.example: She wrote a rough draught of the letter.

dresser.example: Her clothes are folded in the dresser.
dresser.example_zh: 她的衣服摺好放在衣櫥裡。

dressing.example: The nurse changed the dressing on his wound.
dressing.example_zh: 護理師更換了他傷口上的敷料。

dual.example: The car has a dual control system.
dual.example_zh: 這輛車有雙重控制系統。

dubious.example: I am dubious about his story.

duration.example: The duration of the movie is two hours.

dusk.example: The birds returned to their nests at dusk.
dusk.example_zh: 鳥兒在黃昏時飛回巢裡。

dwarf.example: The story is about a kind dwarf.
dwarf.example_zh: 這個故事講的是一個善良的小矮人。

dwell.example: Wild animals dwell in the forest.
dwell.example_zh: 野生動物棲息在森林裡。

dwelling.example: Their dwelling was a small wooden hut.
dwelling.example_zh: 他們的住所是一間小木屋。

eccentric.example: The eccentric artist wore odd clothes.
eccentric.example_zh: 那位古怪的藝術家穿著奇裝異服。

eclipse.example: We watched the solar eclipse safely.
eclipse.example_zh: 我們安全地觀看了日蝕。

edible.example_zh: 不是所有的菇類都可以食用。

editorial.example: The newspaper printed an editorial on the issue.
editorial.example_zh: 這份報紙就此議題刊登了一篇社論。

emigrant.example: The emigrant left his country for a new life.
emigrant.example_zh: 這名移民離開祖國去追求新生活。

emigration.example: Emigration rose during the hard times.
emigration.example_zh: 在艱困時期，移居外國的人增加了。
